title: IU names former Navy research and innovation leader as chief advisor for national security R&D

title: IU Indianapolis graduates highlight community impact through business and policy work
summary_en: Indiana University Indianapolis will graduate over 5,600 students this week. Graduates Aissa Condori and Evren Elliott share how IU Indianapolis shaped their growth and career paths.
title_cn: IU Indianapolis graduates highlight community impact through business and policy work
